# StateJar

> Deterministic, minimal-disclosure memory infrastructure for multi-session conversational AI. No transcripts. No drift. No token burn. Backed by Indian Patent No. 202621017626.

StateJar replaces chat-history replay and probabilistic vector recall with content-addressed structured state: conversations are extracted into structured facts, canonicalized into a deterministic JSON form, and hashed with SHA-256 into `shm_…` handles. Each LLM query receives only the minimal subset of fields it needs, with a full audit trail.

## Key facts

- ~78% token savings versus replaying full chat history
- SHA-256 deterministic content-addressed handles: same meaning → byte-identical handle, every time
- Raw transcripts are never stored or sent to the model
- Append-only versioning: updates create new handles linked by parent_handle; history never mutates
- Conflicting facts are preserved as explicit conflict records, never silently overwritten
- Every LLM call is logged and deterministically replayable
- BYOK (bring your own key) LLM gateway; provider keys encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM
- Stack: FastAPI (Python 3.12) backend, React 18 frontend, MySQL 8 append-only store

## The 10 patent modules

1. State Extraction — turns raw conversation text into structured state (facts, preferences, constraints, goals).
2. Canonicalization — one meaning, one byte sequence: sorted keys, normalized numbers and dates, versioned schema.
3. Handle Generation — SHA-256 over canonical state yields a deterministic `shm_` content address.
4. Deduplicated Storage — identical meaning is stored exactly once.
5. No Full Chat Replay — raw transcripts are rejected at write time; only structured state is kept.
6. Minimal Disclosure Retrieval — each query discloses only the fields it needs (e.g. 2 of 14).
7. Append-Only Versioning — updates create new handles; history is immutable.
8. Conflict Preservation — contradictions are recorded, never overwritten.
9. Cross-Session Consistency — the same memory across sessions, providers, and models.
10. Audit + Replay — reconstruct exactly what any response saw.

## Links

- Website: https://statejar.com
- Playground: https://statejar.com/playground
- GitHub: https://github.com/KING-OF-FLAME/StateJar
- Full details: https://statejar.com/llms-full.txt
